description_long: This lamppost features a rustic, slightly curved wooden pole with a pointed top, giving it a handcrafted appearance. Three rectangular lantern-style light fixtures are attached to the post via metal brackets and arms, each with frosted glass panels that emit a warm, diffused glow. The metalwork is a muted gray, contrasting with the rich brown of the wood, and the lanterns are arranged at varying heights for visual interest. The design is simple yet charming, reminiscent of traditional lantern posts found in parks or along scenic walkways. There are no visible decorative flourishes or embellishments, focusing on functional elegance. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for outdoor urban or park environments.
description: A rustic wooden lamppost with three rectangular lantern-style lights attached by gray metal brackets, emitting a warm glow. The design is simple, functional, and visually appealing, suitable for parks or walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing two lanterns clearly, one higher and one lower, with the wooden post and metal brackets visible.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting all three lanterns, their staggered arrangement, and the curved nature of the wooden post.
description_view_2: Rear view with only one lantern visible, showing the plain back of the post and minimal metalwork.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the vertical alignment of the three lanterns and the full length of the post.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Rectangular lantern-style heads with frosted glass panels and muted gray metal frames.
